creator: jamie.fullerton@me.com
text:
Hi, just wanted to notice that I had exactly the same error under FreeBSD 10.0 beta 4. I tried around with changing make.conf etc. but the only thing that solved the problem was adding:

CFLAGS="-DNETSNMP_BROKEN_INLINE"

to the Makefile.
Maybe one point that is 'special' here is that I use a different prefix and localbase than '/usr/local'.=
